zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich II. von Sayn於1154年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次可布倫可布倫可布倫時，他的父親Eberhard I. von Sayn17歲，母親Kunigunde von Isenburg30歲。他於大約1179年與Agnes von Saffenberg在德國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1203年4月在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 麥延-可布倫本多福賽享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich II. von Sayn于1154年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次可布倫可布倫可布倫时，他的父亲Eberhard I. von Sayn17岁，母亲Kunigunde von Isenburg30岁。他于大约1179年与Agnes von Saffenberg在德国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1203年4月在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 麥延-可布倫本多福賽享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sayn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Turkish: ornamental name or nickname from a derivative of saymak ‘to respect’, interpreted as ‘respectful’.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: II.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich II. von Sayn was born in 1154, in Koblenz, Koblenz, Koblenz, Rhineland, Prussia, his father, Eberhard I. von Sayn, was 17 and his mother, Kunigunde von Isenburg, was 30. He married Agnes von Saffenberg about 1179, in Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in April 1203, in Sayn, Bendorf, Mayen-Koblenz, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich II. von Sayn est né en 1154, à Koblenz, Koblenz, Koblenz, Rhénanie, Prusse, son père, Eberhard I. von Sayn, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Kunigunde von Isenburg, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Agnes von Saffenberg environ 1179, à Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en avril 1203, à Sayn, Bendorf, Landkreis Mayen-Koblenz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 49 ans.

Er hat um 1179 in Deutschland Agnes von Saffenberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich II. von Sayn(이)가 1154년 플레우ss 리인플로빈츠 카블렌즈 카블렌즈 카블렌즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eberhard I. von Sayn(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Kunigunde von Isenburg(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1179년 독일에서 Agnes von Saffenberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1203년 4월 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 메이-코블렌즈 벤도르프 지에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich II. von Sayn nasceu em 1154, em Koblenz, Koblenz, Koblenz, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, seu pai, Eberhard I. von Sayn, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Kunigunde von Isenburg, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes von Saffenberg aproximadamente 1179, em Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em abril de 1203, em Sayn, Bendorf, Landkreis Mayen-Koblenz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich II. von Sayn родился в 1154 г. в местности кобленц, кобленц, кобленц, раинпровинз, Пруссия, его отцу по имени Eberhard I. von Sayn было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Kunigunde von Isenburg, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes von Saffenberg около 1179 г. в местности Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер апрель 1203 г. в местности сеин, бендорф, ландкрис меиен-кобленц, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 49 лет.
